Listen actively and try to understand different perspectives, rather than dismissing them. Be open-minded and willing to consider new information and evidence. Avoid getting defensive or aggressive, as this can escalate disagreements. Instead, focus on finding common ground and working towards a solution that prioritizes the well-being of everyone involved. Remember, effective communication is key to resolving conflicts and finding a resolution that works for everyone.
